_note: Full site data — upload as site-data.json to GitHub

ministries.name: Sound Ministry
ministries.desc: Skilled audio engineers and technicians ensuring excellence in sound for every service and event.

ministries.name: Media Ministry
ministries.desc: Producing anointed video, audio, and digital content that extends CHM's message far beyond our walls.

ministries.name: Livestream Ministry
ministries.desc: Broadcasting services and events live to our global online congregation across multiple platforms.

ministries.name: Crusades
ministries.desc: Large-scale evangelistic crusades bringing salvation, healing, and revival to regions and cities.

ministries.name: Retreats
ministries.desc: Spiritual retreats for individuals, couples, youth, and leaders — times of focused encounter with God.

ministries.name: Conferences
ministries.desc: Annual and seasonal conferences designed to equip, refresh, and ignite believers for Kingdom impact.

ministries.name: Recovery Ministry
ministries.desc: Supporting those recovering from addiction, loss, and life crises through a grace-filled, Christ-centered process.

ministries.name: Inner Healing
ministries.desc: Facilitating emotional healing from trauma, grief, and brokenness through pastoral care and Spirit-led ministry.

ministries.name: Deliverance Ministry
ministries.desc: Walking alongside individuals in spiritual deliverance and freedom from bondage through prayer and the Word.

ministries.name: Hospital Ministry
ministries.desc: Visiting the sick, praying for healing, and providing spiritual support in local hospitals and care facilities.

ministries.name: Prison Ministry
ministries.desc: Bringing hope, the Word, and the love of Christ to incarcerated individuals and their families.

ministries.name: Clinical/Medical
ministries.desc: Health fairs, medical screenings, and healthcare education for underserved members of our community.

ministries.name: Good Samaritan
ministries.desc: Meeting practical needs in our community through food distribution, clothing drives, and emergency relief.

ministries.name: Missions
ministries.desc: Supporting missionaries and conducting mission trips to share Christ across nations and cultures.

ministries.name: Evangelization
ministries.desc: Taking the Gospel to the streets, campuses, workplaces, and beyond through intentional outreach.

ministries.name: Adult Ministry
ministries.desc: Growing adults in faith, purpose, and community through life groups, seminars, and service opportunities.

ministries.name: Senior Ministry
ministries.desc: Honoring and engaging our senior members through fellowship, care visits, and tailored programming.

ministries.name: Children's Ministry
ministries.desc: Nurturing children ages 3-12 in the love of God through creative, Bible-based teaching and fun activities.

ministries.name: Youth Ministry
ministries.desc: Raising a bold generation of young believers through discipleship, leadership, and Holy Spirit encounters.

ministries.name: Singles Ministry
ministries.desc: Empowering unmarried adults to thrive in purpose, community, and godly relationships.

ministries.name: Marriage Ministry
ministries.desc: Strengthening marriages through couples' retreats, counseling, mentorship, and biblical teaching on covenant love.

ministries.name: Spiritual Warfare
ministries.desc: Equipping believers to stand firm and fight victoriously using the full armor of God.

ministries.name: Prophetic Ministry
ministries.desc: Activating and stewarding the prophetic gifts within the body for edification, exhortation, and comfort.

ministries.name: Bible Study
ministries.desc: In-depth study of God's Word for all ages — Wednesday evenings and small group settings throughout the week.

ministries.name: Worship Ministry
ministries.desc: Anointed musicians, singers, and worshippers leading the congregation into God's presence each service.

ministries.name: Intercessory Prayer
ministries.desc: A dedicated team of intercessors standing in the gap for individuals, leaders, and nations.

ministries.name: Prayer Ministry
ministries.desc: Covering the church and community in intercession through daily prayer chains, prayer rooms, and corporate gatherings.

ministries.name: Marriage Blessing
ministries.desc: Celebrating and consecrating marriages through pastoral blessing, prayer, and biblical counsel.

ministries.name: Laying on of Hands
ministries.desc: We practice laying on hands for healing, commissioning, and the impartation of spiritual gifts.

ministries.name: Anointing Oil
ministries.desc: Anointing with oil accompanies prayers for healing and consecration as instructed in James 5.

ministries.name: Water Baptism
ministries.desc: Believers are baptized by full immersion as a public declaration of faith and new life in Christ.

ministries.name: Foot Washing
ministries.desc: Following Jesus' example, we practice foot washing as a sacred act of humility and servanthood.

ministries.name: Holy Communion
ministries.desc: We observe the Lord's Supper regularly, remembering Christ's sacrifice and proclaiming His death until He comes again.

page_about.storyTitle: Founded in Faith, Sustained by Grace...
page_about.storyP1: CHM Church of God was established with a singular vision: to be a house of prayer for all nations, where lives are transformed by the power of God's Word and Spirit. From humble beginnings, God has grown this congregation into a vibrant, multicultural family serving West Orange, New Jersey and extending its reach around the world...
page_about.storyP2: We believe that every person — regardless of background, language, or nationality — is created in the image of God and deserves to hear the Good News of Jesus Christ. This conviction drives everything we do.
page_about.mission: To glorify God by making disciples of all nations through prayer, preaching, holiness, and service — transforming communities one life at a time.
page_about.vision: To be a lighthouse of God's glory — a multicultural, Spirit-filled congregation that reflects the Kingdom of Heaven and impacts the earth.

beliefs.title: The Holy Scriptures
beliefs.text: The Bible is the inspired, infallible, and authoritative Word of God — our sole rule of faith and practice.

beliefs.title: Salvation by Grace
beliefs.text: We believe in one God, eternally existing in three persons: Father, Son, and Holy Spirit.

beliefs.title: The Church
beliefs.text: Salvation is by grace through faith in Jesus Christ alone — His death, burial, and resurrection.

beliefs.title: Water Baptism
beliefs.text: Believers are filled with the Holy Spirit, evidenced by speaking in tongues and a life of power and witness.

beliefs.title: The Church
beliefs.text: The Church is the body of Christ, called to worship, fellowship, discipleship, ministry, and evangelism.

beliefs.title: Divine Healing
beliefs.text: God heals the sick in response to faith and prayer, as demonstrated throughout Scripture and still today.

beliefs.title: Water Baptism
beliefs.text: Baptism by immersion is an outward sign of an inward transformation, following faith in Jesus Christ.

beliefs.title: The Return of Christ
beliefs.text: Jesus Christ will return personally, bodily, and visibly to establish His eternal Kingdom.

page_about.heroEye: A Spirit-filled community rooted in prayer, holiness, and the transforming power of Jesus Christ.
